notes: Beach Body 2026. CRITICAL UPDATE: Left shoulder prehab protocol activated. Replaced vertical overhead volume and deep incline angles with neutral scapular plane pressing (Landmine & Floor Press). Do not push past pain thresholds.

exercises.name: Push-up
exercises.notes: Mandatory warm-up. Stop 2 reps before failure to keep shoulders fresh.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: EXECUTE AS: Single-Arm Landmine Press. Safe angled press in the scapular plane to protect the left shoulder.

exercises.name: Floor Press
exercises.notes: Dumbbell potisk s tal. Triceps and chest focus. The floor blocks elbows from dipping too low, completely unloading the shoulder capsule.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Strict form. Dropped to 5kg permanently for Week 3 to focus on lateral delt isolation without upper trapezius compensation.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.notes: Floor core activation. Slow and controlled tempo.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: 1-second pause at the bottom to protect the spine.

exercises.name: Lunge
exercises.notes: Bulgarian split squats on bench for piriformis stabilization.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: Explosive hip hinge, tight core engagement.

exercises.name: Hip Raise
exercises.notes: Glute bridge with resistance band, strong peak contraction.

exercises.name: Pull-up
exercises.notes: Assisted with power band on the cage. Focus on the lats.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Drive elbows down. Maintain safe tracking for left shoulder.

exercises.name: Row
exercises.notes: Seated cable rows. Strict positioning without spinal rotation.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Crucial prehab for rotator cuff and posterior deltoid health.

exercises.name: Curl
exercises.notes: Dumbbell bicep curls. Left arm failure dictates set completion.

exercises.name: Renegade Row
exercises.notes: Maintain stable hips in plank position.

exercises.name: Lunge
exercises.notes: High-volume weighted step-ups for metabolic conditioning.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Floor to Shelf
exercises.notes: KB Halo + Strict Press Combo. Mapped to Garmin taxonomy.

exercises.name: Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Lying leg raises for lower abs. Protect lumbar spine.
